title: Bubbles propagation-policy.yaml (v5.1 / M9)
description: Cross-train propagation policy. Lives at repo root or under config/. Owned by bubbles.propagate (J-Roc). Enforced by Gates G121/G122/G123.

receivingTrainValidationMode.description: Validation level required on the receiving train after propagation.

backportRequiresApproval.description: When true, reverse-edge propagation (backport) requires explicit approvalToken from receiving train owner.

ledgerPath.description: Relative path to the propagation-ledger.yaml/jsonl. Default: 'propagation-ledger.yaml'.
